releaseNotes: A living cinematic backdrop on Android TV — the home screen is now a layered ambient environment (depth gradient, soft category-driven glow, vignette, gentle motion) instead of a black void. Channels start faster and recover on their own: a channel that shows the no-signal screen now auto-retries within ~2 seconds, so feeds that used to need a tap come up by themselves. The no-signal screen gains on-screen controls (minimise, previous/next channel, fullscreen). Opening a channel from any home rail (My Favourites, Continue Watching, Kids…) now shows that rail as the player's channel list, matching Search. Fixed duplicated channel names in search results (e.g. M-Net). Favourited channels reliably appear in the Favourites view. Fixes DLHD sports channels that showed a black screen; restores brand logos for many channels. Also includes the broadcast-style TV Guide, 6h adaptive EPG, typo-tolerant search, and the down-chevron player minimise.
